tasks.label: transcript:sync (folder open)
tasks.command: if [ -s "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" ]; then . "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use --silent >/dev/null; fi; pnpm run transcript:sync

tasks.label: transcript:ingest (manual)
tasks.command: if [ -s "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" ]; then . "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use --silent >/dev/null; fi; pnpm run transcript:ingest
tasks.detail: Requires WORKSPACE_KIT_POLICY_APPROVAL for non-interactive ingest. Prefer transcript:sync on folder open.

tasks.label: workflow-cannon: prepare-ui
tasks.command: if [ -s "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" ]; then . "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" && nvm use --silent >/dev/null; fi; pnpm run ui:prepare
tasks.detail: Build workspace-kit and compile the Cursor extension before launching Extension Development Host.
